revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿四]][[zh:六月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿四]][[zh:六月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿四]][[zh:六月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿四]][[zh:六月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 24|qq=June 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|672|en|672|qid=Q30601|lt=672|1=672}} ) – Prince Ōama (later Emperor Tenmu), who had taken Buddhist vows and secluded himself, departed Yoshino to overthrow Emperor {{ill|Emperor Kōbun|en|Emperor Kōbun|qid=Q357242|lt=Kōbun|1=Emperor Kōbun}} , marking the start of the {{ill|Jinshin War|en|Jinshin War|qid=Q2378252|lt=Jinshin War|1=Jinshin War}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 12|en|July 12|qid=Q2688|lt=July 12|1=July 12}} , {{ill|1441|en|1441|qid=Q6402|lt=1441|1=1441}} ) – The {{ill|Kakitsu Incident|ja|Kakitsuの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu Incident|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred. Akamatsu Mitsusuke, the governor of Harima, invited {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshinori|en|Ashikaga Yoshinori|qid=Q239170|lt=Ashikaga Yoshinori|1=Ashikaga Yoshinori}} , the {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=shogun|1=Shogun}} , to his residence and assassinated him.
== Births == * Year 5 of {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , {{ill|1562|en|1562|qid=Q6621|lt=1562|1=1562}} ) – {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|en|Katō Kiyomasa|qid=Q1069843|lt=Katō Kiyomasa|1=Katō Kiyomasa}} , samurai commander (d. {{ill|1611|en|1611|qid=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}} ) * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Tamura Ritsunosuke|ja|田村律之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamura Ritsunosuke|1=Tamura Ritsunosuke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21700572}} <ref>{{cite book|language=ja|author=小林友雄・五月女倬男・小西千代蔵・雨宮義人|title=栃木県農業先覚者顕彰録|publisher=明治百年記念栃木県農業祭開催委員会|date=1968|page=32|qq=}} </ref>, known as the "Father of Beer Barley" in Tochigi Prefecture<ref>{{cite book|language=ja|editor=野村敬子・霧林宏道|title=真中一代さんの栃木語り|publisher=瑞木書房|date=2015-10-15|page=233|isbn=978-4-87449-188-1|qq=}} </ref> (d. {{ill|1932|en|1932|qid=Q18743|lt=1932|1=1932}} )
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kōryaku|en|Kōryaku|qid=Q252777|lt=Kōryaku|1=Kōryaku}} /Year 6 of {{ill|Tenju|en|Tenju|qid=Q1145023|lt=Tenju|1=Tenju}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} , {{ill|1380|en|1380|qid=Q6327|lt=1380|1=1380}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōmyō|en|Emperor Kōmyō|qid=Q555520|lt=Emperor Kōmyō|1=Emperor Kōmyō}} , 2nd Emperor of the Northern Court (b. {{ill|1321|en|1321|qid=Q5769|lt=1321|1=1321}} ) * Year 1 of Kakitsu (Julian calendar July 12, {{ill|1441|en|1441|qid=Q6402|lt=1441|1=1441}} ) – Ashikaga Yoshinori, 6th shogun of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (b. {{ill|1394|en|1394|qid=Q6398|lt=1394|1=1394}} ) * Year 16 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}} , {{ill|1611|en|1611|qid=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}} ) – Katō Kiyomasa, samurai commander (b. {{ill|1562|en|1562|qid=Q6621|lt=1562|1=1562}} )
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Torch|en|Torch|qid=Q327954|lt=Torch Festival|1=Torch}} of the Yi people
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|23|6|25|5|24|7|6|0624|qq=}}
